message: Update 1.0.8: Updater fixed (UTF-8 BOM + visible DOWNLOAD UPDATE). Use CHECK FOR UPDATES on the login screen if needed.
releaseNotes: 1.0.8 — BOM-safe version.json parse (root cause of silent update failure). Unmissable DOWNLOAD UPDATE modal. CHECK FOR UPDATES on login + Settings. Visible installer fallback. If in-app update still fails on a very old build, download fresh from pronova.site.
